themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "He was five and twenty years old when he began to reign, and reigned sixteen years in Jerusal...". Word-study detail reinforces "מֶ֣לֶךְ: also with the king - a king".
